docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-22-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ALFREDRO ROJAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS SENT TO THE AGENT OF SERVICE'S ADDRESS AND THEREFORE HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II ALLOWED THE CASE TO BE HEARD. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-07-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,300.00 FILED BY ROJAS, ALFREDO AS TO DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
